summary: iter55.16 granular per-staff RBAC-lite fully verified. Backend: 16/16 new permission tests + 76/77 regression tests pass (1 pre-existing skip). Catalog endpoint returns 12 codes with label+description, gated staff-only (VIP/normal → 403). PUT /admin/users accepts allowed_permissions admin-only with TOTP step-up, sanitizes unknown codes silently. Backward compat verified (empty/unset perms → full access). Narrow-scope employees correctly gated: kyc-only passes /admin/kyc/queue and 403 on orders/withdrawals/transactions/users. Admin never gated. Legacy can_manage_blocklist=false + allowed_permissions=['blocked_contacts'] → grants access (new supersedes legacy boolean). OpenAPI now at 107 paths as expected. Frontend: 'Funciones autorizadas' column renders in AdminUsers, PermissionMultiSelect popover shows 12 checkboxes with all required data-testids (allowed-permissions-row-{id}, open-permissions-{id}, permission-option-{id}-{code}, save-permissions-{id}, clear-permissions-{id}). Sidebar filtering works: employee with perms=['kyc'] sees only Resumen+KYC; with perms=[] sees all 14 staff items (backward compat). Yellow dot replaces ADMIN badge for highlighted items.
critical_code_review_comments: services/permissions.py — clean design; predicate is pure/testable, catalog is single source of truth, sanitize_permissions correctly filters unknown codes. Backward-compat semantics (empty list = full access) documented and enforced.
admin_users.py PUT — admin-only guard for allowed_permissions is correctly placed before the DB write, sanitized after the check. TOTP step-up is enforced via _enforce_totp_step_up before mutation.
AdminPanel.jsx hasPerm() correctly OR-combines isAdmin + empty-list backward compat + explicit inclusion — matches backend semantics exactly.
Non-admin viewers see read-only count of permissions (not the selector) — matches spec.
Minor: PermissionMultiSelect popover renders inside table cell; consider z-index/overflow tests on smaller viewports (not tested here) but no visible issue at 1920px.
test_credentials: test_session_admin_X, test_session_employee_X, test_session_vip_X, test_session_normal_X (documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md); admin & employee have TOTP secret JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXPJBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP.
seed_data_creation: Test file uses direct MongoDB writes to set/reset user_test_employee01.allowed_permissions during tests; teardown restores clean state via _reset_perms(). Frontend E2E also toggled allowed_permissions directly in DB then reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter55.16 (RBAC-lite) is fully green. Permission catalog at GET /api/admin/permissions/catalog (12 codes). Gate via require_permission(request, code) — admin bypasses, employee empty-list bypasses, else must include code. PUT /admin/users allowed_permissions is admin-only. Frontend testids: allowed-permissions-row-{user_id}, open-permissions-{user_id}, permission-option-{user_id}-{code}, save-permissions-{user_id}, clear-permissions-{user_id}. Employee session token cookie: test_session_employee_X.
